name: Toast POS API
what_it_does: Restaurant management REST API covering menus, orders, loyalty, payroll, and delivery for 120,000+ US restaurants.
use_cases: Automate menu updates across multiple restaurant locations
Sync order data with third-party delivery or analytics platforms
Build loyalty and reward program integrations
Aggregate reporting across a restaurant group's locations
Automate payroll data export for restaurant staff
not_for: Non-restaurant retail (use Lightspeed or Clover instead)
Direct payment processing without a Toast merchant account
Merchants outside the United States (Toast is US-focused)
best_when: Building automation or integration agents for restaurants already running Toast POS
avoid_when: You need a POS-agnostic solution or operate outside the US

auth.notes: OAuth 2.0 with client credentials and restaurant-level scopes; separate tokens per restaurant location

pricing.paid_tiers: Requires active Toast merchant account; Toast charges SaaS + hardware fees; API access via partnership
pricing.notes: No self-serve API access; must apply to the Toast Partner Program for production access

performance.rate_limits: 500 req/min per token; lower limits on some reporting endpoints

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Well-structured JSON errors with code, field, and message; restaurant-specific error codes documented
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Idempotency keys on order and payment creation; menu update operations are not idempotent
known_agent_gotchas: Must apply for Toast Partner Program — no self-serve sandbox
Token is per restaurant location; agents managing chains need many tokens
Menu update propagation can be slow (minutes) across terminals
Payroll endpoints require additional partnership tier

security_score_components.security_notes: PCI-DSS and SOC2 compliant; restaurant-scoped OAuth tokens; OpenAPI spec available for schema validation
